channel.title: Baja on CJ's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Baja on CJ's Blog

item.title: Diagnosing That I Do NOT Have a Blown Head Gasket
item.description: I am the proud owner of a 2003 Subaru Baja, but the thing is low-key a POS. When I bought the car in September of 2025 I had a vague idea of what I was getting into. The main issue was a P420 code which led to my first home-repair: replacing the catalytic converter. Around that time it got an oil change, and a top-off of coolant. Much time has passed since then, and honestly no major issues. But the other week I noticed that my coolant is once again at low, and that’s never a good thing…
